context: Note 1: The lab fridge in room 204 is set to 4 degrees Celsius. Note 2: The thermostat in conference room A is set to 21 degrees. Note 3: The lab fridge in room 204 is set to 2 degrees Celsius. Note 4: Building security desk is on the ground floor near the east entrance.
questions: What temperature is the lab fridge in room 204 set to?

context: Employee handbook excerpt: All hires complete onboarding within their first two weeks. The IT helpdesk is reachable at extension 4242. The cafeteria opens at 7:30 am on weekdays. Note: starting Monday, the cafeteria opens at 7:00 am on weekdays.
questions: What time does the cafeteria open on weekdays?

questions: What percentage of annual revenue came from the largest single customer?
